title: Nursery Rhyme. DXC. Natural History.
content:
Goosey, goosey, gander,
            Where shall I wander?
        Up stairs, down stairs,
            And in my lady's chamber;
        There I met an old man
            That would not say his prayers;
        I took him by the left leg,
            And threw him down stairs.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DXC. Natural History." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
